message:
data(raptorq): update tests, decision records, and closure signoff

raptorq/tests: restructure dual-kernel and wavefront pipeline test
suites for clearer assertion grouping and add coverage for the new
clamped-env-override policy introduced in the prior GF256 commit.

tests/raptorq_perf_invariants: expand performance invariant assertions
to cover the updated decision contract thresholds.

artifacts: update optimisation decision records with entries for the
LimitedWriter decompression guard and asymmetric gRPC size limits.
Update program closure signoff packet with latest gate statuses.

docs: sync closure signoff markdown with JSON artifact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,14 +103,13 @@
